title: Reports
subtitle: Management and administration of report templates

table.noFieldsSelectedDescription: Click on fields in the left panel to add them

delete.title: Delete Template
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.

generate.title: Filters to Generate Report
generate.configureFiltersDescription: These filters will be applied when generating the report. You can filter by date period, jobs, branches, and more.
generate.filterByJobsDescription: Select the jobs to include in the report. Leave empty to include all.
generate.filterByBranchesDescription: Select the branches to include in the report. Leave empty to include all.
generate.filterByDocumentDescription: Select the document type and enter the number. You can add multiple documents.

success.title: Report Generated Successfully!
success.message: Your report is being processed in the background.
success.whatsNextDescription: Once processing is complete, you can download your report from the reports history.

totalRow.name: Total Row Name *
totalRow.nameDescription: This will be the name that appears in the first column (if enabled)
totalRow.customDescription: Select the aggregation type for each numeric column
totalRow.defaultDescription: Will be applied to all numeric fields with aggregation
totalRow.noNumericFields: No numeric fields with aggregation available. Add numeric fields first.
totalRow.groupByDescription: Select criteria to group totals. Totals will be displayed automatically when the selected criteria changes.
totalRow.labelTemplateDescription: Custom template for the grouped total label. Use variables in curly braces to insert dynamic values.
totalRow.showGroupContextDescription: If enabled, the label will be automatically completed with group context (employee, month, week) if no template is specified.
totalRow.exampleEmployee: If grouping by employee: 'Total John Doe'
totalRow.exampleEmployeeMonth: If grouping by employee and month: 'Total John Doe - January 2024'

subtitle.create: Configure the fields and options for your custom report template

preview.title: Report Preview (Excel Simulation)
preview.description: Showing {count} sample rows. The final report will include all data according to applied filters.

jsonPreview.title: JSON Preview (Test)
jsonPreview.description: This is the JSON that will be generated when saving the report. This view is temporary for testing.

validation.fieldsRequired: You must add at least one field to the report
validation.invalidReferences: There are problems with field references. Check the console.
validation.cleanedReferences: Some invalid references were cleaned. Try saving again.

templateCreated.title: Template created
templateCreated.description: The template has been created successfully

templateUpdated.title: Template updated
templateUpdated.description: The template has been updated successfully

templateDeleted.title: Template deleted
templateDeleted.description: The template has been deleted successfully

jsonCopied.title: JSON copied
jsonCopied.description: The JSON has been copied to clipboard
